114354.title: Taste of Magic: Archmage's Shadow [Slice-of-Life LitRPG]
114354.description:
What if the world's strongest mage traded her legendary power for a rolling pin?

[Archmage] Melina rewound time to save Alemahria, sacrificed her magic, leaving the Church and nobles behind.

Instead of fighting monster hordes, she will knead, bake and for the first time ever taste a slice of happiness.

But peace is elusive when old enemies lurk in the shadows, the Church still haunts her, and her best customer is a tart-obsessed wyrm.

What to expect:

-LitRPG with classes, stats, and baking skills 

-Regressor MC with a dark past

-Slow Burn slice-of-life (with occasional monster attacks)

-Monster familiar

New chapter every Tuesday, Thursday, Friday and Sunday.

Join my Discord for newest updates and announcements.

Join my Patreon for 20+ advanced chapters.

112647.title: The Legacy of the Moon and the Sun: Feelings That Change Even History
112647.description:
A fantasy story about love, friendship, family, and many other things that are completely "insignificant" when not only the future of humanity, but the entire history of Earth is at stake.

But not every fantasy begins with swords and spells. Some begin with awkward conversations, cringeworthy jokes, and protagonists who are just trying to survive society, school, and their own emotions.

This is a slow-burn story that starts as a drama-comedy, where the fantastic seeps in gradually. If you’re looking for immediate action, you’ll likely be disappointed. But if you're patient, and like characters who evolve with the story, then this one's for you.

New chapter at least every two weeks.

97880.title: Goblin Hunter
97880.description:
In the tourist town of Ferndale, CA, Kimmie Blanco is accosted by a goblin hiding in the forest behind her rustic bed-and-breakfast. She’s horrified at first, but her inquisitive and determined nature pushes her to learn everything she can about this strange new supernatural creature, and its possible connection to the brutal deaths of her aunt and uncle. Realizing she can’t do it all by herself, she reaches out to the best goblin hunter in the world, Jed Hauk… only to get his brooding son, Ollie, and his snarky pygmy goblin sidekick, Grika, instead.

Ollie reluctantly helps Kimmie in her hunt, despite suffering his own crisis of faith in the ‘family business.’ The life of a hunter is lonely, unappreciated, and littered with personal losses, and his enthusiasm is further diminished when what should be a simple hunt turns into a fiasco. When more dead bodies start showing up in the forest, Kimmie and Ollie are forced to confront the mystery this strange little goblin presents. Is he acting alone, or is he simply the harbinger for more trouble to come?

113171.title: A vigil for humanity
113171.description:
A long and brutal civil war comes to an end. A dictator is overthrown. The people step out, blinking into the light of an unfamiliar freedom.

Few know how hard the road ahead is. How many old wounds must be re-opened for them to heal properly. Fewer even, know how to guide a country through this painful transition.

And then there's the thing that nobody knows. The reality of their world that was hidden from them by the old regime.

---

Updates every Friday.

119384.title: A Crown of Ash and Gold [Dark Fantasy]
119384.description:
A more tightly-woven Game of Thrones, reborn in a Nordic land.

A dirge for one age, the twilight of an empire. The ancient throne teeters, while a long-slumbering rebellion gathers on the eastern winds. As all eyes fix upon the contested crown, a name forgotten for a thousand years is whispered: Dragon.

In this volatile landscape, to secure a crown—or to ignite a war—an unprecedented auction is held in the capital city. Eight treasures of power and betrayal have become the stakes in a great game. But the ninth treasure should not exist: a necklace engraved with a devastating lie. It's a dagger aimed at the Empire's heart.

This storm was orchestrated by shrewd players:

🎭 Ysolda: An astute agent. Armed with only her wits, she has to choose between loyalty and survival. Tasked with uncovering a conspiracy, she finds herself drawn into the very eye of the storm. Can she grab a lifeline in the intense conflicts?

🐺 Grey Wolf: A fallen prince driven by vengeance. The grand auction is meant to be his masterpiece, but he finds himself caught in a deadly trap. When his mask is cracked and his soul is put on trial, which side will he choose in the end?

⚔️ The Kings & Killers: While the king and the rebel leader forge a pact that could save many lives, in the shadows of a tavern, a spymaster and a legendary swordsman play their deadly game. When conspiracies and lies are forged into an invisible blade, what fate awaits the kingdom?

Every player believes they control the game. But when ancient dragons return to incinerate their chessboard, all golden rules are burned away with it.

And amidst the burning ashes, the true story begins—aboard a prisoner's cart, where a youth of unknown identity opens his eyes.

What to Expect in This Book

👑 An Intricately Woven Narrative with Multiple POVs.

👑 Exceptional Character Development.

👑 Slow-Burn Story with Shocking Twists.

👑 Masterful Political Intrigue, Deception, and Strategy. 

👑 Indomitable Spirits in a Brutal World.

This is a new story, but set in the familiar world of The Elder Scrolls. It builds extensively on the Civil War narrative, introducing a more thrilling and intense conflict while preserving the essence of the original.

Think of this as an epic that stands alone and requires no pre-existing knowledge.

New chapters every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.

108745.title: Moonfire & Midnight
108745.description:
An exiled princess, a poisoned husband, and a battle for power—Eirian Soliel refuses to be forgotten, but can she turn a cold marriage into a fiery alliance before it’s too late?

First cousin to the King and the darling of the Court of Sorrow, Eirian has spent most of her life indulging all her whims and fantasies under the protection of her royal blood, but when her father’s sudden re-marriage results in a son, she finds herself suddenly shuffled aside.

On top of that, her longtime on-and-off romantic partner suddenly betrays her. Instead of proposing to her, he shows up to her birthday ball, married to a low-ranked Lady without a word of warning.

Eirian’s life is upended, and her stepmother succeeds in exiling her into an arranged marriage with a general who never leaves the distant borderland. Regimented, completely disinterested in the capitol and the Court, and dying from a poison no one can identify, her new husband would rather continue his simple life with his mistress than welcome his new wife, but Eirian refuses to go down without fight.

Determined to make a place for herself if she cannot find one, Eirian finds herself facing an enemy she never expected, and she underestimates her shy, gentle husband.

Will the General fall for his vivacious Princess, or will Eirian be set aside again?

121068.title: Construction Mage
121068.description:
Paying rent sucks. Properties are overpriced. But could you fix that with magic?

Become the strongest, defeat powerful enemies, save the world—those are the typical things people who get summoned to another world do. Clayton Stratton won’t have any of that, though. He’d rather stay in the comforts of his home and enjoy a cup of tea over a book. However, that doesn’t mean he’ll ignore the world’s problems. He’ll just leave it to others instead. 

Unfortunately for Clay, he came into an unfriendly world, broke. With monsters overflowing from dungeons limiting humanity’s living space to the few walled cities they have, a regular job won’t be enough to pay the bills. From what he has read about dungeons, the living conditions will only get worse the more time passes. In order to build himself a cozy home and guide others with his knowledge of the dungeons, he’ll have to utilize the miraculous power of magic to tackle both goals. 

Construction work isn’t easy. Neither is getting others to listen to his word without coming off as a crazy doomer. Thankfully, his two goals may not be as different as he thinks.

What to expect?

- LitRPG with lots of leveling up

- An Earth Mage with an unorthodox build (Not just shooting big spells)

- Kingdom building? More like building buildings.

- Dungeon delving

- Recreating modern comforts with magic (Who wants to live somewhere without proper plumbing?)

- Probably a shovel

Release Schedule

On release, 5x a week for the first four weeks (Extra chapters for hitting milestones)

Then tentatively 4x a week (Mon-Thu)

95904.title: Spell Weaver [Book 2 Complete]
95904.description:
Alex was just trying to escape his dead-end job and overbearing family. Then the System arrived, bringing with it magic, Rifts, and the chance for ordinary people to become extraordinary. Unfortunately for Alex, his stats started out as unimpressive as his old life. But when he gains the unique trait {Primordial Will}, which only allows him to put his free points into one stat, everything changes—though not necessarily for the better.

This is a slow burn story with Alex learning a lot about magic, himself, and his friends. There are moments that just show normal life, and some that feel like there is no direction or plot at all. There are some very high-octane, adventure moments where the numbers go way up, and there are also some losses that aren't going to feel great. Losses happen and mistakes are made, but our MC will continue to grow stronger. 

This series follows Alex as he begins to master the art of Mana Threads and creates a revolutionary new magic system with Spell Circles. He starts to realize that magic isn’t just a tool—it’s a path to power that few can fully grasp. But with the world’s governments struggling to contain the rising number of superhuman threats, Alex will have to navigate more than just monsters and Rifts. In a world where “might makes right,” who really calls the shots?

What to expect:

- Slow story by RR standards
- The "stuck in a Rift arc" is about 20 chapters and has Xianxia elements
- A realistic take on how Earth adapts to System integration.
- Weak to Strong to Godlike MC
- A unique magic system creation, blending rituals and runes to create Spell Circles. (This happens gradually over the first two books. Then he uses it for the rest of the series.)
- After Book One, there are a lot of party dynamics, creating a large cast of characters.

Chapters are 3000 words on average, with three chapters released weekly.

Currently posting Monday / Wednesday / Friday at 10AM EST.

Read 30 chapters ahead on Patreon!
Join the Discord Community!

89699.title: Grimoire
89699.description:
Albion. A land of magic, mysteries, and cults. Amongst the many dangers are horrific beings from another world, existing and acting beyond human comprehension. They are called Eldritch. Merely looking at an Eldritch can drive an ordinary human insane; if they don’t die outright. When a human seals an Eldritch’s power within themselves, a grimoire is formed.

The most infamous grimoire in history is the Silver Grimoire. 

The Silver Grimoire, alongside its twin, the Golden Grimoire were the catalyst for all magic. Together they united humanity to defeat the Eldritch thousands of years ago. However, the Silver Grimoire launched a rebellion to seize control of the world, weaponizing the very Eldritch they once fought. Upon its defeat, the Silver Grimoire vowed to one day return and bring about destruction. Eventually the tale of the Gold and Silver Grimoires would fade into legend. 

After the Eldritch returned ten years ago, the nation of Easenna was left in ruins. Blamed for causing their return, the King of Easenna alongside his followers were overthrown by Albion through a long and violent war. As a result, Albion was left as the sole superpower on the continent.

Aria Corvo, an Easennian swordswoman-turned prisoner of war comes face-to-face with the Silver Grimoire. A man by the name of Espoir claiming to fight grimoires and Eldritch.
